triggers.name: GCP MSSQL: High CPU utilization

triggers.description: The CPU utilization is too high. The system might be slow to respond.

triggers.name: GCP MSSQL: Database engine is down
triggers.expression: last(/GCP Cloud SQL MSSQL by HTTP/gcp.cloudsql.mssql.db.state)=0
triggers.description:
Database engine is down.
If an instance experiences unplanned (non-maintenance) downtime, the instance state will still be RUNNING, but the database engine state metric will report 0.

triggers.name: GCP MSSQL: Disk space is critically low
triggers.expression: last(/GCP Cloud SQL MSSQL by HTTP/gcp.cloudsql.mssql.disk.utilization) >= {$CLOUD_SQL.MSSQL.DISK.UTIL.CRIT}
triggers.description: Critical utilization of the disk space.

triggers.name: GCP MSSQL: Disk space is low
triggers.expression: last(/GCP Cloud SQL MSSQL by HTTP/gcp.cloudsql.mssql.disk.utilization) >= {$CLOUD_SQL.MSSQL.DISK.UTIL.WARN}
triggers.description: High utilization of the storage space.

triggers.name: GCP MSSQL: Failed to get the instance state
triggers.expression: last(/GCP Cloud SQL MSSQL by HTTP/gcp.cloudsql.mssql.inst.state) = 10
triggers.description:
Failed to get the instance state. 
Check access permissions to GCP API or service account.

triggers.name: GCP MSSQL: Instance is in failed state
triggers.expression: last(/GCP Cloud SQL MSSQL by HTTP/gcp.cloudsql.mssql.inst.state) = 5
triggers.description: The instance creation failed, or an operation left the instance in an own bad state.

triggers.name: GCP MSSQL: Instance is in maintenance
triggers.expression: last(/GCP Cloud SQL MSSQL by HTTP/gcp.cloudsql.mssql.inst.state) = 4
triggers.description: The instance is down for maintenance.

triggers.name: GCP MSSQL: Instance is in suspended state
triggers.expression: last(/GCP Cloud SQL MSSQL by HTTP/gcp.cloudsql.mssql.inst.state) = 1
triggers.description:
The instance is in suspended state. 
It is not available, for example, due to problems with billing.

triggers.name: GCP MSSQL: Instance is in unknown state
triggers.expression: last(/GCP Cloud SQL MSSQL by HTTP/gcp.cloudsql.mssql.inst.state) = 6
triggers.description: The state of the instance is unknown.

triggers.name: GCP MSSQL: Instance is stopped by the owner
triggers.expression: last(/GCP Cloud SQL MSSQL by HTTP/gcp.cloudsql.mssql.inst.state) = 2
triggers.description:
The instance has been stopped by the owner. 
It is not currently running, but it's ready to be restarted.

triggers.name: GCP MSSQL: High memory utilization
